mapper.select: SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, member_id AS memberId, partner_name AS partnerName, business_number AS businessNumber, contact_name AS contactName, contact_phone AS contactPhone, bank_name AS bankName, account_number AS accountNumber, partner_intro AS partnerIntro FROM partner WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE partner SET contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, bank_name = #{bankName}, account_number = #{accountNumber}, partner_intro = #{partnerIntro, jdbcType=CLOB} WHERE partner_id = #{partnerId}
mapper.select: SELECT pl.place_id FROM partner p JOIN place pl ON p.partner_id = pl.partner_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.partner_id AS partnerId, p.member_id AS memberId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, p.business_number AS businessNumber, p.contact_name AS contactName, p.contact_phone AS contactPhone, p.bank_name AS bankName, p.account_number AS accountNumber, p.partner_intro AS partnerIntro, p.status, pl.place_id AS placeId, pl.address AS address, pl.image_url AS imageUrl FROM partner p LEFT JOIN place pl ON p.partner_id = pl.partner_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY p.created_at ASC
SELECT place_id FROM place WHERE partner_id = #{partnerId} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
